A list of external resources related to PebbleOS, including presentations and a video discussion.

# Purpose
The content provides a list of external resources related to PebbleOS. It includes links to presentations and a video that offer information on various aspects of PebbleOS. The first link directs to a presentation on Pebble OS capabilities, which may provide insights into the features and functionalities of the operating system. The second link is a presentation aimed at non-firmware engineers, likely offering guidance on firmware development. The third link is a YouTube video featuring a discussion by former Pebble engineers on the significance of making Pebble's code freely available. These resources serve as supplementary material for users or developers interested in learning more about PebbleOS.
